name: web3-daily
description: Web3 Daily Digest - 7-section structured digest: macro analysis (3 themes), capital flow tables, KOL sentiment (CN/EN comparison), risk alerts with action recommendations, opportunity signals, and one-sentence market summary. No personal data required.
author: Alex Wang

externalServices.name: J4Y Backend API
externalServices.purpose: Fetch public Web3 digest (news, KOL sentiment, market data)
